title: PepsiCo Fridge Stock Check
why: We’re doing this to ensure customers always get cold drinks and to decide if we need to order more.

steps.title: Go to the drinks fridge
steps.instruction: Walk to the fridge location shown in the image.
steps.hint: If there are multiple fridges, choose the one labelled ‘PepsiCo’.

help.text: Ask a teammate where the PepsiCo fridge is if unsure.

steps.title: Open the fridge and count Pepsi cans
steps.instruction: Count all Pepsi (blue) cans on all shelves. Enter count mentally; confirmation comes next.
steps.hint: Move cans slightly if stacked; don’t forget the door racks.

help.text: Count shelf by shelf; say the number out loud to remember.

steps.title: Check coldness
steps.instruction: Touch a can. If it’s not cold, note that stock may have been recently loaded or the unit needs service.
steps.hint: Cold to the touch = OK; warm = flag for follow‑up.

help.text: If warm, notify manager; we’ll auto‑create a task later.

steps.title: Finalise
steps.instruction: Confirm the count and temperature check are complete.
steps.hint: This locks the step and updates today’s log.

help.text: If you made a mistake, use Back to correct before finishing.
